## Auth packages

- No dedicated auth package in pubspec

## Auth-related screens

- LoginPage → lib/features/auth/presentation/login_page.dart
- RegisterPage → lib/features/auth/presentation/register_page.dart
- _SocialButton → lib/features/auth/presentation/login_page.dart
- _SocialButton → lib/features/auth/presentation/register_page.dart

## Notes

- Check `lib/features/auth/` or `lib/view/login/` for flows
- Firebase auth service typically in `lib/global/services/auth_service.dart`
